creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
(In reply to Adam Weinberger from comment #3)
> I'm out of town for turkeyfest. It'll be a couple days until I can
> investigate this. 

No problem. The currently installed mail/spamassassin continues to work.

> Is this related to the recent changes to perl?

It could be. I've been running Perl 5.20 for a number of weeks, and I have successfully reinstalled mail/spamassassin a few times using portupgrade right up until now, when other ports were out of date.
